title: MOCHEG: Multi-modal Multi-hop Fact-Checking with Explanations
description: Multimodal fact-checking requiring reasoning over both text and images. Annotators verify claims using multimodal evidence, identify relevant spans in text evidence, and provide explanations for their verdicts. Supports multi-hop reasoning across modalities.
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 46th International ACM SIGIR Conference on Research and Development in Information Retrieval",
    year = "2023",
    publisher = "Association for Computing Machinery",
    url = "https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3539618.3591766",
    pages = "2560--2565"
